Package com.irurueta.units

Class MagneticFluxDensityConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.MagneticFluxDensityConverter
  • public class MagneticFluxDensityConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does magnetic flux density conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying magnetic flux density measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_GIGATESLA
      Number of Teslas in one Gigatesla.
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_KILOTESLA
      Number of Teslas in one Kilotesla.
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_MEGATESLA
      Number of Teslas in one Megatesla.
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_MICROTESLA
      Number of Teslas in one microtesla.
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_MILLITESLA
      Number of Teslas in one millitesla.
      (package private) static double TESLAS_PER_NANOTESLA
      Number of Teslas in one nanotesla.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MagneticFluxDensityConverter

        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(MagneticFluxDensity input,
                           MagneticFluxDensity output)
        Converts a magnetic flux density to provided output magnetic flux density unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input magnetic flux density to be converted.
        output - output magnetic flux density where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static MagneticFluxDensity convertAndReturnNew​(MagneticFluxDensity input,
                                                      MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input magnetic flux density to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted magnetic flux density.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(MagneticFluxDensity magneticFluxDensity,
                           MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        magneticFluxDensity - input magnetic flux density to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(MagneticFluxDensity input,
                           MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit,
                           MagneticFluxDensity result)
        Converts a magnetic flux density to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input magnetic flux density to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - magnetic flux density where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       MagneticFluxDensityUnit inputUnit,
                                       MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a magnetic flux density value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - magnetic flux density value.
        inputUnit - input magnetic flux density unit.
        outputUnit - output magnetic flux density unit.
        Returns:
        converted magnetic flux density value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             MagneticFluxDensityUnit inputUnit,
                             MagneticFluxDensityUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a magnetic flux density value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - magnetic flux density value.
        inputUnit - input magnetic flux density unit.
        outputUnit - output magnetic flux density unit.
        Returns:
        converted magnetic flux density value.

      • teslaToNanoTesla

        public static double teslaToNanoTesla​(double tesla)
        Converts provided Tesla value to nanoteslas.
        Parameters:
        tesla - tesla value.
        Returns:
        some amount of magnetic flux density converted to nanoteslas.

      • teslaToMicroTesla

        public static double teslaToMicroTesla​(double tesla)
        Converts provided Tesla value to microteslas.
        Parameters:
        tesla - tesla value.
        Returns:
        some amount of magnetic flux density converted to microteslas.

        Returns:
        some amount of magnetic flux density converted to milliteslas.
